label: Polygon.io
description: Access real-time and historical market data for stocks, options, forex, and crypto via Polygon.io's REST and WebSocket APIs.

form.title: Connect Polygon.io
form.subtitle: Paste your Polygon.io API key to start pulling market data for stocks, options, forex, and crypto.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Polygon.io API key. Found in your Polygon.io Dashboard under API Keys — takes about 30 seconds to set up.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Polygon.io API Key

### Steps

1. Sign in (or sign up) at [polygon.io](https://polygon.io).
2. Click your avatar or account name in the top-right corner to open the **Dashboard**.
3. Navigate to **Dashboard → API Keys** (direct link: [app.polygon.io/dashboard/api-keys](https://app.polygon.io/dashboard/api-keys)).
4. Click **Create API Key** if you don't already have one, give it a name like `Anton`, and confirm.
5. Copy the generated key — it starts with a string of random characters.
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Connect**.

### Notes

- Free tier keys are rate-limited and restricted to end-of-day data. Upgrade to a paid plan for real-time data and higher rate limits.
- Your key is stored locally in Anton and sent only to Polygon.io's API endpoints (`api.polygon.io`).
- If you suspect your key is compromised, regenerate it in the Dashboard — the old key stops working immediately. Paste the new one here to reconnect.
- Polygon.io's full API reference: [polygon.io/docs](https://polygon.io/docs).

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in your Polygon.io Dashboard → API Keys. Stored locally and sent only to api.polygon.io.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override only if you're using a proxy or a private deployment. Leave blank to use the default Polygon.io endpoint.
